Description: Speedway travel center #9651 at I-75 Exit 104 (KY-418, Athens-Boonesboro Rd), open 24 hours with commercial diesel lanes (official site: 3 diesel lanes), showers, Wi-Fi, and a certified truck scale. Directories list 125 truck parking spaces; part of Pilot's One9 Fuel Network of Speedway commercial fueling lanes.

Independent Shell-branded truck plaza at I-75 Exit 38 (KY-192) in London with about 50 truck parking spaces, showers, laundry, restaurant, trailer drop, travel store, and scales per directory listings.

Business Name: London Travel Plaza (AMBEST, formerly London Auto/Truck Center BP)
Description: Family-owned AMBEST travel plaza at I-75 Exit 41 (KY-80) in London with 9 fueling positions, over 100 free truck parking spots, CAT scale, showers, and a Southern home-cooking restaurant. Formerly known as London Auto/Truck Center (BP).

Large independent 24-hour truck plaza at I-75 Exit 62 (Renfro Valley/Mount Vernon) with directory-reported 200 parking spots, 8 fuel lanes, 24-hour restaurant, showers, 3 truck service bays with tire repair and towing, motel, and WiFi.

Independent 24-hour fuel center at I-75 Exit 59 near Mount Vernon/Livingston with truck parking in a lighted paved lot, 24-hour diesel and restaurant/deli, showers, trucker lounge, travel store, and trailer drop service.
Legacy independent truck stop at I-75 Exit 97 (US-25/US-421 S) in Richmond; historically offered truck parking, restaurant, showers, laundry, repair, and scales.

Independent Shell-branded fuel stop and food mart at I-75 Exit 95 in Richmond, open 24 hours with 2 diesel lanes, deli, and 2 showers. Directories list 10 truck parking spaces with a $10 fee and overnight parking available.
Love's Travel Stop #291 at I-75 Exit 95 in Richmond with 63 truck parking spaces, 7 private showers, CAT scale, 24-hour Arby's, and 24-hour Love's Truck Care. Fuel includes diesel, DEF, and propane.

24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-75 Exit 136 (KY-32, Sadieville) with 80 truck parking spots, 7 showers, CAT scale, on-site restaurant (Hardee's per directories), and a 2-bay Speedco/Love's Truck Care shop.

Flying J Travel Center #664 at I-75 Exit 171 in Walton, open 24 hours with 215 truck parking spots, 12 diesel lanes, 14 showers, a Denny's restaurant, laundry, CAT scale, propane and RV dump. Located next door to the Blue Beacon truck wash.

Business Name: Mr. Fuel Travel Center (One9 Fuel Network)
Description: Mr. Fuel Travel Center (part of Pilot Flying J's One9 Fuel Network) at I-71/75 Exit 175 in Walton, open 24 hours with 7 fuel lanes, 5 showers, about 15 truck parking spots, CAT scale, ATM and convenience store.
Pilot Travel Center #321 at I-71/75 Exit 175 (Richwood) in Walton, open 24 hours with diesel lanes, showers, CAT scale, DEF lanes, ATM and premium Wi-Fi.
TravelCenters of America travel center at I-75/I-71 & KY 338, Exit 175 in Walton, open 24/7 with BP gas and diesel, 90 truck parking spaces, 6 showers plus 1 handicap shower, laundry and restrooms.

Pilot Travel Center #437 at I-75 Exit 11 in Williamsburg, open 24 hours with diesel lanes, showers, laundry, CAT scale, and EV charging; Wendy's/Huddle House food options adjacent per directory listings.

Business Name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Corbin
Description: Blue Beacon truck wash at I-75 Exit 29 in Corbin. Services include tractor/trailer exterior washes, reefer and dry-box trailer washouts, engine washes and RV/motorcoach washing.

Commercial cargo-tank cleaning facility at Highway Transport's Cincinnati-area service center in Florence, offering chemical tank trailer cleaning, caustic and detergent washes and steaming; a directory lists it off I-75 Exit 180. Open Monday-Friday.

Business Name: First American Truck Wash and Chrome Shop
Description: Independent truck wash and chrome shop on Triport Circle in Georgetown, in the same Triport Road commercial area as the Exit 129 truck stops. Listed as a livestock trailer washout provider by Livestock Network.

Business Name: TNT Services (Fleet Washing / Drive-Thru Truck Wash)
Description: TNT Services operates in Lexington, KY offering mobile fleet power washing and detailing plus a drive-thru truck wash bay, per its official site.
Truck wash listed at the Derby City Truck Stop property at I-75 Exit 62 in Mount Vernon, per Kentucky truck wash directories.

Business Name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Walton
Description: Two-bay Blue Beacon truck wash at I-75 Exit 171 in Walton, next to the Flying J travel plaza, offering truck and exterior trailer washes, trailer washouts (no tanker or livestock trailers), engine washes, aluminum brightening and undercarriage rinse.

Business Name: Kentucky Weigh Station - I-75 Southbound (Kenton County)
Description: KYTC/KSP commercial vehicle weigh and inspection station on southbound I-75 in Kenton County at about mile marker 168, roughly two miles north of the Crittenden exit (Exit 166); upgraded in 2023 with a weigh-in-motion (WIM) system that screens axle and gross weights at highway speed. PrePass-equipped inspection site.

Business Name: Kentucky Weigh Station - I-75 Northbound (Scott County)
Description: Kentucky commercial-vehicle weigh station on I-75 northbound in Scott County near Georgetown; Wikipedia notes the northbound truck scale sits just beyond the mile-127 rest area, with the exit 129 Pilot truck stops located south of the scale.

Business Name: Kentucky Weigh Station - I-75 Northbound (Laurel County)
Description: Kentucky State Police CVE weigh station on I-75 northbound in Laurel County near London, paired with the southbound mile-34 facility. KYTC implemented a new driver camera system at "its Laurel County I-75 northbound weigh station" (CVSA Guardian, Q3 2022); coopsareopen designates the I-75 northbound Post 7 site a Truck Rest Haven with safe parking.

Business Name: Kentucky Weigh Station - I-75 Southbound (Laurel County)
Description: Kentucky State Police CVE commercial vehicle weigh station on I-75 southbound at mile 34 in Laurel County, south of London. All commercial vehicles must weigh when the station is open; Kentucky sets no minimum weight threshold.
